# Auto-Generated API

> Generated by Antigravity SDLC Automation Platform

## Features

- as a user, i want to browse restaurants, categories, and menus to order food.
- as a restaurant partner, i want to manage my menu, orders, and insights.
- as a user, i want to track my orders in real-time and receive notifications.
- as a restaurant partner, i want to receive notifications for new orders and updates.
- search bar for restaurants and dishes
- filtering and sorting options for restaurants and menus
- cart and checkout functionality
- payment gateway integration
- real-time tracking map
- notifications and alerts

## Quick Start

1. Install dependencies:
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

2. Run the application:
```bash
python main.py
```

3. Access the API documentation:
- Swagger UI: http://localhost:8000/docs
- ReDoc: http://localhost:8000/redoc

## API Endpoints

- `GET /` - Root endpoint
- `GET /health` - Health check
- `POST /api/v1/users/` - Create user
- `GET /api/v1/users/` - List users
- `GET /api/v1/users/{user_id}` - Get user by ID
- `POST /api/v1/items/` - Create item
- `GET /api/v1/items/` - List items
- `GET /api/v1/items/{item_id}` - Get item by ID
